goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: CSS Module purity defect: the entirely global selector needs a real local anchor applied to the timer aside. Add styles.timerPanel alongside global timer-panel and change only the selector to .timerPanel :global(.muted), preserving #d8ded4 and all layout/semantics/behavior.

worker_package.objective: Make exact two-file timer class/selector wiring repair, then complete all final cooking/full/protected/build/database/integrity gates.
verify: Change only timer aside class token and local/global selector; preserve color and behavior.
Run scoped format/lint/type, isolated build, cooking E2E, full gates, three protected E2Es, disposable DB, live PID/port/hash/diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Hashes differ or color/global CSS/DOM/layout/logic/tests change.

evidence: T084 exact navigation passed and failed only on CSS purity.
Timer markup has only global classes; CookingMode already imports styles.
Local timerPanel plus global muted matches same paragraph truthfully.
